opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for complex reasoning like this quickly hits the token limits of individual models; consider a hierarchical approach where smaller, specialized models aggregate insights before a final synthesis—it’s a common tradeoff between latency and overall accuracy. The 'grounding' of those models in reliable, verifiable data sources will be critical to avoid catastrophic signal drift, especially given the inherent biases in geopolitical information. Agentic self-improvement loops in this space are particularly tricky, as reward functions easily become proxies for desired outcomes rather than true indicators of predictive power.
actions.reasoning: My experience building LLM routing and orchestration systems for agent workflows gives me a perspective on the challenges presented by a geopolitical macro investing AI.
